1.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)

hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

1.gl: literally one officiating, a priest; also (by courtesy) an acting priest (although a layman)
1.kj: chief ruler, [idiom] own, priest, prince, principal officer.

1.gl: a head person (of any rank or class)
1.kj: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.

something fixed, i.e. a covenant. an allowance

37.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

37.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)

37.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
37.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

37.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
37.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

37.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
37.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

37.gl: beef cattle or an animal of the ox family of either gender (as used for plowing); collectively, a herd
37.kj: beeve, bull ([phrase] -ock), [phrase] calf, [phrase] cow, great (cattle), [phrase] heifer, herd, kine, ox.

38.gl: to tithe, i.e. to take or give atenth
38.kj: [idiom] surely, give (take) the tenth, (have, take) tithe(-ing, -s), [idiom] truly.
38.dv: a primitive root (identical with H6238 (עָשַׁר)); to accumulate; but used only as denominative from H6235 (עֶשֶׂר);

38.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
38.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
38.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

38.gl: literally one officiating, a priest; also (by courtesy) an acting priest (although a layman)
38.kj: chief ruler, [idiom] own, priest, prince, principal officer.
